category_sources: source_facts.description identifies an HTML to text converter; official homepage describes an HTML to text/ascii converter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official homepage use the project name Vilistextum.
docs_sources: Official Vilistextum site provides a dedicated manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and manual provide source archives/manuals but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says HTML to text converter; official manual names vilistextum as an html to ascii converter.
